name: Milk Chocolate Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, greased roasting pan, combine popcorn and nuts.
2. In a large, heavy saucepan, combine chocolate chips, corn syrup, and butter.
3. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils, stirring constantly.
4. Pour the melted chocolate mixture over the popcorn and toss well to coat evenly.
5. Transfer the mixture to a preheated 300°F oven (150°C) and bake for 45 minutes, stirring frequently.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely before serving.
7. Store in an airtight container for up to two weeks.
